created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for the first observation of the name itself, excluding supplemental cross-name wildcard or transport positions.

registration_date.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for the last RegistrationGranted block that started the current or most recently released registration epoch.

info.description: Machine-readable publication of the currently shipped public API surface derived from apps/api/src/main.rs.
info.title: bigname API v1

parameters.description: Address anchor for the collection or history read. Malformed addresses return 400 invalid_input; valid addresses are normalized to lowercase.

parameters.description: Compact records read mode. `auto` uses declared cache when it can satisfy the requested values from replayable state, otherwise verified resolution for requested selectors. When no declared selectors are available, app-facing defaults probe only a bounded basic profile set.
parameters.name: mode

parameters.name: content_hash

parameters.name: coin_types
